Our work

A little of the beauty we create every day — and the calm space we do it in.

About

A place to breathe out

Fleur is a small salon with no queues and no rush. We keep the pace calm on purpose: warm light, tea, your favourite music, and stylists who listen rather than push.

Every specialist trains regularly, we work only with professional products, and we sterilise our tools in front of you. Beauty starts with care — and with trust.

— the Fleur team
